response.justification: Bogdan possesses excellent domain expertise in geospatial data platforms through GISCollective and has strong experience building high-throughput distributed systems. However, his recent technical stack heavily favors TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. While DLang shares systems-level concepts with C++ and Rust, his actual C++ experience is brief and dated (2014-2015), and he lacks Rust experience, which are the primary technologies required for this role.
strengths: Strong domain expertise in geospatial data processing and GIS platforms (Founder of GISCollective).
Proven experience building high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated flexibility to work across the full technical stack and adapt to new tools.
concerns: Lacks recent, production-level experience with Modern C++, which is the primary language for the role.
No experience with Rust, which is the acceptable alternative to C++ for this position.
No explicit experience with navigation routing or tiling pipelines, despite general GIS knowledge.
